for each DRG is compared to the overall average. 
SHORT NAME: DRG_RLTV_WT 
LONG NAME: DRG_RLTV_WT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
VALUES: 
Valid numeric, four decimal places (e.g., 1.0329) 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
This ratio is published annually in the Federal Register for each DRG. A DRG with a weight of 2.0000 
means that charges were historically twice the average; a DRG with a weight of 0.5000
